task_description: Build a complete premium e-commerce static website for Zevrian Global LLC, a private label Amazon FBA brand. The site features 18 products across 3 categories, checkout modal, contact forms, legal pages, and is deployable to Cloudflare Pages as pure static HTML/CSS/JS with no build step.

verification.summary: All 15 files created. 4 JS files pass node --check syntax validation. All 10 HTML pages have consistent nav/footer/logo. Design system CSS contains all required colors. 18 products with complete data. Directory structure follows Cloudflare Pages conventions. No build step needed - pure static files.
